title: -sv flag not accessible through command line arguments
body:
One can call yosys like this:

```
$ yosys -p 'read_verilog -sv foo.v; prep; show'
```

And it will run fine, allowing some of the SystemVerilog features.

However, it seems to be impossible to enable SystemVerilog features if you want to pass your files as command line arguments. For example, something like this does not work (obviously):

```
$ yosys --sv -p 'prep; show' foo.v
```
